tactic: fly.pieter.com went from $0 to $1M ARR ($87K MRR) in just 17 days. First project ever to go up this fast. 320K people played in first 17 days. Speed to market + viral mechanics + public building = rapid scaling.
reviewer_notes: Verified revenue from levelsio public dashboard. Fastest product launch in indie hacking history.
extracted_method: Build fast ship public add viral mechanics (leaderboard) let users compete

tactic: $420K/mo total revenue at ~80% profit. Portfolio: PhotoAI $161K/m RemoteOK $93K/m NomadList $61K/m Interior AI $43K/m other $34K/m. Zero employees. One-person portfolio approach proven at scale.
reviewer_notes: Verified from public revenue dashboard. 80% margins = $336K/mo profit solo. Portfolio diversification works.
extracted_method: Build multiple products each solving one problem well compound portfolio over time

tactic: 20 mega shifts making 2026 best time to build: 1) Hardware+AI unlocked 2) SaaS imploding (AI replicates $500K software for pennies) 3) Outcome-based pricing eating subscriptions 4) Community-first software-second 5) Prototyping instant (MVP 1x/week) 6) Superniche is new niche (costs 1/100th).
reviewer_notes: Greg Isenberg sold 3 startups advised Reddit/TikTok. Framework for 2026 strategy.
extracted_method: Superniche targeting + community-first + outcome-based pricing + rapid prototyping

tactic: Ideabrowser.com community signals feature scans Reddit Facebook Groups and thousands of internet communities using AI agents to find startup ideas with high likelihood of success. Pipeline of validated problems with frustrated customers already lined up.
reviewer_notes: Tool for validating market demand before building. Reduces build risk.
extracted_method: Use community signal tools to validate demand before building

tactic: Timeline hooks get 9.91-10.67% reply rate vs problem hooks 3.90-4.77%. Structure emails around compressed achievement windows. Example: Got 3 demos in 48 hours vs Struggling with low reply rates?
reviewer_notes: Based on billions of emails analyzed. 2.5x improvement from hook change alone.
extracted_method: Lead with timeline + specific result not problem statement

tactic: Smaller targeted campaigns (50 or fewer recipients) average 5.8% reply rate vs 2.1% for larger lists. Personalization depth + hyper-targeting = 2.76x better replies. Volume is dead precision wins.
reviewer_notes: Validates micro-cohort approach. 50 hyper-targeted > 1000 generic.
extracted_method: Segment into cohorts of 50 or fewer with deep personalization

tactic: Email warming timeline increased to 14-21 days in 2026 (up from 7-14). Start 5-10/day then increase over 4-6 weeks. ESPs now weight engagement depth not just opens. Erratic volume = spam flag.
reviewer_notes: Update all warmup documentation. Pre-warmed inbox services (DeliverOn/EmailBison) skip this.
extracted_method: 14-21 day warmup minimum 5-10/day start 4-6 week ramp

tactic: Clay (150+ data providers for enrichment) + Smartlead (deliverability + scale) = AI personalization at scale. Top performers seeing 6x higher response rates. AI-driven reply detection categorizes and tailors follow-ups automatically.
reviewer_notes: Enterprise-grade personalization for solo ops. 6x response rate improvement documented.
extracted_method: Clay for enrichment + Smartlead for sending + AI for personalization at scale

tactic: Small TikTok creators under 50K followers get 30% click rate vs 7% for 100K-200K accounts. Micro-influencers hitting $80-$120 per thousand on TikTok Shop. Interest-based algo means follower count less critical than content resonance.
reviewer_notes: Content farm strategy validated. Small accounts = higher engagement = better affiliate revenue.
extracted_method: Build multiple small niche accounts (5K-50K) not one big account

tactic: TikTok Shop projected $30B GMV in US in 2026. Traditional pay-for-post/UGC influencer model is dead. Creative Volume and Creative Diversity are the two most important phrases of 2026.
reviewer_notes: Validates AI UGC factory approach. Volume of creative variants > single perfect ad.
extracted_method: Create creative volume (many variants) not single perfect creative

tactic: Linah AI + Nano Banana Pro + Fastmoss = fully automated UGC content factory. Turns proven TikTok Shop content into hyper-realistic AI UGC videos. Claims: CPMs under $0.10 no paid ads no creators no samples.
reviewer_notes: Stack worth testing. CPM claims need verification. Fastmoss for research Nano Banana for visuals Linah for UGC videos.
extracted_method: Fastmoss (product research) + Nano Banana Pro (visuals) + Linah AI (UGC videos)

tactic: Web-to-App adoption grew 77% YoY UA spend in channel up 54%. Route Facebook/TikTok ads to mobile-optimized web pages complete purchase on web (2-5% fees vs 30%) then redirect to app. Restores full attribution data post-iOS 14.5.
reviewer_notes: HIGHEST synergy stack. Bypass 30% fees + restore attribution. Must implement for Lock Apps.
extracted_method: Web landing page with payment > app download. Stripe fees (2-5%) vs App Store (30%)

tactic: Median 14-day revenue approximately 8x higher for hard paywalls vs freemium. Retention: hard paywall 12.8% vs soft/freemium 9.3%. Higher refund rates (5.8%) but net positive. Works best for apps with clear immediate value.
reviewer_notes: Validates hard paywall strategy for Lock Apps. 8x revenue multiplier is massive. Already shipped to biomaxx.
extracted_method: Hard paywall from day 1 for apps with clear value proposition

tactic: Connor Burd: $185K/mo MRR from mobile app portfolio. Independent app studio focused on consumer subscription apps. Key: distribution from day 1 partner with influencers build around validated audiences. App Payout started with TikTok trend research.
reviewer_notes: Verified via Indie Hackers interview. Distribution-first approach. Influencer partnerships for launch.
extracted_method: Distribution first (influencer partnership before building) + consumer subscription focus

tactic: Max Artemov: 30-app portfolio at $22K/mo built in less than 1 year. ASO-first approach: find keywords with popularity 20+ and difficulty under 60 build app around keyword use in title/subtitle/description. ASO boosted metrics 50%.
reviewer_notes: ASO-first validation. Keyword research BEFORE building. 50% improvement from ASO alone. Goal: $100K MRR in 2026.
extracted_method: ASO keyword research first build app around keyword 30-app portfolio strategy

tactic: Reddit appears in 68% of AI search responses. #2 most visible site in Google US results (after Wikipedia). Reddit citations in AI overviews surged from 1.30% to 7.15% in Q2. Expected 75%+ citation rate by end of 2026.
reviewer_notes: Reddit GEO is massive opportunity. Strategic Reddit presence = AI citation = organic discovery.
extracted_method: Create strategic Reddit presence for best X and comparison queries

tactic: Solo founders reaching $1M+ ARR with 0-3 employees becoming common. Anthropic CEO predicted first solo unicorn in 2026. 75% launched on Product Hunt 90% built audiences on Twitter 95% spent $0 on ads. Build-in-public + speed to market = primary moats.
reviewer_notes: Validates solo founder approach. Build in public + Product Hunt + Twitter = distribution without ads.
extracted_method: Build in public launch Product Hunt build Twitter audience zero ad spend

tactic: Nano Banana Pro (Google Gemini 3) creates 4K AI images with flawless text rendering and reasoning. Combined with Veo 2 (cinematic scenes) and Kling (b-roll/transformations) covers all AI video production needs for 2026.
reviewer_notes: Tool stack for AI content factory. Compare to current Leonardo + HeyGen + D-ID stack.
extracted_method: Nano Banana Pro (images) + Veo 2 (scenes) + Kling (b-roll) = full AI video pipeline

tactic: Epic Games Store offers 0% fee on first $1M revenue via web payments then 12% after (vs Apple/Google 30%). Post Epic vs Apple ruling US apps can link to external payment options. Web-to-app + Epic = massive fee savings.
reviewer_notes: 0% to $1M is significant. Combined with web-to-app funnel saves 30%+ on all revenue up to $1M.
extracted_method: Web payments via Epic Games Store for 0% fees up to $1M revenue

tactic: Gartner projects 40% of enterprise software will have AI agents by end of 2026 (8x explosion from current). Build AI-native not AI-added. Agentic AI creating new class of solo unicorns.
reviewer_notes: AI agent infrastructure is the opportunity. Build tools/platforms for AI agents not just AI-powered tools for humans.
extracted_method: Build for AI agent economy not just AI-powered human tools
